query: US spot Bitcoin ETF net flows late June 2026 and early July 2026, weekly trend from Farside Investors and SoSoValue. Are net outflows continuing into the week of June 29-July 3 2026? What is the Bitcoin price trend in late June 2026?
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings:

**Did net outflows continue into the week of June 29–July 3, 2026? — Yes.**
- The week recorded **~$527M in net outflows** (-$526.64M per Farside/incrypted), the **8th consecutive week of outflows**.
- Daily flows: Jun 29 **-$231M**, Jun 30 **-$222.6M**, Jul 1 **-$296M** — driven overwhelmingly by BlackRock's **IBIT**.
- The week ended with a reversal: **+$223.5M inflow on July 2** and further inflows July 3.

**Immediate aftermath:** July 2–7 saw ~$510M inflows over three sessions, ending a 10-day/$2.73B outflow streak — but flows stayed choppy (July 9 flipped back to -$189.5M).

**Bitcoin price trend, late June 2026 — sharp decline:**
- Fell from ~$64,400 (Jun 17) to a low close of **$58,559 on Jun 30** (intraday near $58,000), roughly -14% over 3 months.
- Recovered to low-$60Ks by early-mid July ($62,544 on Jul 3, $64,127 on Jul 10) as inflows returned.
- IBIT ETF bottomed at $33.29 (Jun 30, near its 52-week low) and rebounded to $36.23 by July 10.

The full report with sources and structured data points has been submitted.

sources.title: Bitcoin ETFs See Over $526 Million in Outflows Over Four Days as Eight-Week Streak Continues
sources.snippet: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $526.64 million in outflows for the week from June 29 to July 3. Outflows continued for eight consecutive weeks.

sources.title: U.S. Spot Bitcoin ETFs Record $527M Net Outflows From June 29 to July 2
sources.snippet: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs shed roughly $527 million in net outflows across four sessions June 29–July 2, before a $223.5M reversal on the final day.
